hooks.command: grep -qiE 'implement|feature|build|creat|scaffold|fix|bug|broken|error|issue|regress|crash|fail|change|updat|modif|refactor|revamp|redesign|adjust|correct|resolv|patch|rework|wire|add |new (page|component|section|route|endpoint)' && echo 'REMINDER: Per frontend/AGENTS.md, before writing ANY code for this implementation or fix, READ THE CONTEXT STACK IN ORDER: context/project-overview.md -> architecture.md -> ui-tokens.md -> ui-rules.md -> ui-registry.md -> code-standards.md -> library-docs.md -> build-plan.md -> progress-tracker.md. Rules that never change: no hardcoded hex or raw Tailwind color classes; load a library skill before using that library; run /architect before a complex feature and confirm a plan; after every change update progress-tracker.md, build-plan.md and ui-registry.md; if the same problem persists after one corrective prompt, stop and run /recover.' || true

f=$(grep -oE '"file_path":"[^"]*"' | head -1); printf '%s' "$f" | grep -qiE 'frontend.*src.*[.](tsx?|css)"' && printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"AGENTS.md CHECK before this edit: confirm you have read context/*.md in order (project-overview, architecture, ui-tokens, ui-rules, ui-registry, code-standards, library-docs, build-plan, progress-tracker). No hardcoded hex or raw Tailwind color classes. After this change, update progress-tracker.md, build-plan.md and ui-registry.md."}}' || true

f=$(grep -oE '"file_path":"[^"]*"' | head -1); printf '%s' "$f" | grep -qiE 'components/|[.]tsx"' && printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"REMINDER: you edited a UI component. Run /imprint to capture its patterns into ui-registry.md before finishing (first run on this project: /imprint audit)."}}' || true
